query:
-- Delete old products first
DELETE FROM products WHERE id > 0;

-- Create products for USD
INSERT INTO products (name, slug, description, shortDescription, price, currency, priceUSD, stockQuantity, isActive) VALUES
('6 Packs CurlyEllie', '6-packs-curlyellie-usd', 'Professional hair treatment for 6 months', 'A treatment course sufficient for 6 months', 40.00, 'USD', 40.00, 29890, true),
('3 Packs CurlyEllie', '3-packs-curlyellie-usd', 'Professional hair treatment for 3 months', 'A treatment course sufficient for 3 months', 27.27, 'USD', 27.27, 590, true),
('1 Pack CurlyEllie', '1-pack-curlyellie-usd', 'Professional hair treatment for 1 month', 'A treatment course sufficient for 1 month', 11.11, 'USD', 11.11, 29992, true);
